.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(43, 39, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(55, 45, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #504431 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#504431, color-mix(in srgb, #504431 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #504431 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#504431, color-mix(in srgb, #504431 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(55, 45, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(55, 45, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout-content.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.callout[data-callout-fold=\"\"][data.background: rgba(2, 122, 255, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(55, 45, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-left-split.mod-si.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(55, 45, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked.background: rgb(186, 148, 95) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"checkbox\"]:checked::after.background: rgb(55, 45, 41) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(43, 39, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

kbd.background: rgb(43, 39, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

mark.background: rgba(146, 107, 34, 0.9) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.background: rgb(43, 39, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

pre.language-js.background: rgb(43, 39, 35) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

thead.background: rgb(65, 54, 50) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
